Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: substituir cores hardcoded por Design System tokens

- Converte type aliases (UserStage, UserEmotion, etc.) em enums para runtime
- Substitui cores hardcoded (#FFFFFF, #4285F4, etc.) por tokens do Design System
- Corrige OnboardingFlowNew.tsx: usa colors.raw.neutral[0], colors.raw.success, colors.raw.warning
- Corrige LoginScreenNew.tsx: usa colors.text.primary, colors.background.canvas, colors.raw.primary[400]
- Garante consistência visual entre light/dark mode

Resolve TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
